preconditions: The CT-200 device is properly calibrated
The user has an arm circumference between 22-42 cm
steps: Enter the measurement into the CT-200 device
Take a blood pressure and pulse rate reading
test_cases.expected_result: The device provides a valid blood pressure and pulse rate reading

preconditions: The CT-200 device is properly calibrated
The user has an arm circumference outside the range of 22-42 cm
steps: Enter the measurement into the CT-200 device
Attempt to take a blood pressure and pulse rate reading
test_cases.expected_result: The device displays an error message or does not provide a reading

preconditions: The CT-200 device is properly calibrated
The user has had a mastectomy on one arm
steps: Attempt to take a blood pressure and pulse rate reading on the arm ipsilateral to the mastectomy
test_cases.expected_result: The device displays a warning or error message indicating that the measurement may be unreliable

preconditions: The CT-200 device is properly calibrated
steps: Attempt to take a blood pressure and pulse rate reading without clinician guidance
test_cases.expected_result: The device displays a warning or error message indicating that the measurement may be unreliable without clinician guidance

test_cases.scenario: Valid use with clinician guidance - severe arrhythmia
preconditions: The CT-200 device is properly calibrated
A qualified clinician is present to interpret the results
steps: Take a blood pressure and pulse rate reading with clinician guidance
test_cases.expected_result: The device provides a valid blood pressure and pulse rate reading, and the clinician can interpret the results
